SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-11-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-11-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF LORENSA RAMIREZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT EVER LIMA IS PRESENT.
